description.p: GradientRadial draws a colour ramp from a centre point to a radius. Optional focal coordinates and a focal radius support displaced radial gradients.

field.name: CenterX
field.comment: The horizontal centre point of the gradient.

description.p: The (CenterX, CenterY) coordinates define the centre point of the radial gradient. By default, the centre point is set to 50%.

field.name: CenterY
field.comment: The vertical centre point of the gradient.

description.p: The (CenterX, CenterY) coordinates define the centre point of the radial gradient. By default, the centre point is set to 50%.

field.name: ContainFocal
field.comment: Confines the focal point to the base radius.

description.p: When enabled, the focal point is constrained so that it remains within the base radial gradient circle.

field.name: Flags
field.comment: Dimension flags for radial gradient fields.

description.p: Dimension flags indicate whether radial coordinate fields are fixed or scaled.

field.name: FocalRadius
field.comment: The size of the focal radius for radial gradients.

description.p: If a radial gradient has a defined focal point by setting FocalX and FocalY, the FocalRadius can adjust the size of the focal area. The default of zero ensures that the focal area matches that defined by Radius.

field.name: FocalX
field.comment: The horizontal focal point for radial gradients.

description.p: The (FocalX, FocalY) coordinates define the focal point for radial gradients. If left undefined, the focal point will match the centre of the gradient.

field.name: FocalY
field.comment: The vertical focal point for radial gradients.

description.p: The (FocalX, FocalY) coordinates define the focal point for radial gradients. If left undefined, the focal point will match the centre of the gradient.
The radius of the gradient can be defined as a fixed unit or scaled relative to its container. A default radius of 50% applies if this field is not set.
